shadow.field:
// 全局动画时间
if (typeof noodleTime === 'undefined') noodleTime = 0;
noodleTime += 0.05;

const canvasTex = puzzles.canvasTextures['noodle_canvas'];
const canvas = canvasTex.image;
const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");

// 清空背景
ctx.fillStyle = '#FFF8DC';
ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 300, 300);

// ===== 动态面条主体 =====
ctx.strokeStyle = '#F4A460';
ctx.lineWidth = 15;
ctx.lineCap = 'round';
ctx.lineJoin = 'round';

ctx.beginPath();
ctx.moveTo(40 + 3*Math.sin(noodleTime), 140 + 5*Math.sin(noodleTime*1.1));

// 【修复】正确4参数quadraticCurveTo
ctx.quadraticCurveTo(90, 90 + 10*Math.sin(noodleTime*1.3), 140 + 5*Math.sin(noodleTime*0.7), 130);
ctx.quadraticCurveTo(200 + 8*Math.sin(noodleTime*1.8), 80 + 12*Math.sin(noodleTime*2.1), 260 + 4*Math.sin(noodleTime*1.4), 120 + 6*Math.sin(noodleTime*0.9));
ctx.stroke();

// 面条阴影层
ctx.strokeStyle = '#DAA520';
ctx.lineWidth = 12;
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.moveTo(45, 145);
ctx.quadraticCurveTo(95, 95, 145, 135);
ctx.quadraticCurveTo(205, 85, 265, 125);
ctx.stroke();

// 纹理线（不变）
ctx.strokeStyle = '#CD853F';
ctx.lineWidth = 3;
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.moveTo(60, 135); ctx.lineTo(85, 125);
ctx.moveTo(110, 105); ctx.lineTo(135, 125);
ctx.moveTo(155, 95); ctx.lineTo(185, 110);
ctx.moveTo(210, 115); ctx.lineTo(240, 130);
ctx.stroke();

// ===== 动态酱汁 =====
ctx.strokeStyle = '#FF6347';
ctx.lineWidth = 5;
ctx.lineCap = 'round';
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.moveTo(80 + 2*Math.sin(noodleTime), 140);
ctx.lineTo(75 + 3*Math.sin(noodleTime*1.5), 170);
ctx.lineTo(72 + Math.cos(noodleTime*2), 195);

ctx.moveTo(220 + Math.sin(noodleTime), 125);
ctx.lineTo(228 + 2*Math.cos(noodleTime*1.2), 160);
ctx.lineTo(232 + Math.sin(noodleTime*1.7), 185);
ctx.stroke();

// 酱汁珠子
ctx.fillStyle = '#FF4500';
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.arc(78 + Math.sin(noodleTime), 155, 4, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.arc(225 + Math.cos(noodleTime*0.8), 145, 4, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.fill();

// ===== 眨眼动画 =====
const blink = Math.sin(noodleTime * 4) * 0.3 + 0.7; // 0.7-1.0缩放
ctx.save();
ctx.scale(blink, blink);
ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';
ctx.shadowBlur = 3;
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.arc(110, 90, 18, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.arc(230, 85, 18, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.fill();
ctx.shadowBlur = 0;

ctx.fillStyle = '#2F4F4F';
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.arc(113, 88, 9, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.arc(233, 83, 9, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.fill();

ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.arc(116 + Math.sin(noodleTime*3)*1, 86, 4, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.arc(236 + Math.cos(noodleTime*2.5)*1, 81, 4, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.fill();
ctx.restore();

// ===== 微笑+腮红 =====
ctx.strokeStyle = '#FF1493';
ctx.lineWidth = 4;
ctx.lineCap = 'round';
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.arc(170, 155 + 2*Math.sin(noodleTime*2), 25, 0, Math.PI, false);
ctx.stroke();

ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 105, 180, ${0.4 + 0.1*Math.sin(noodleTime*1.5)})`;
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.arc(95 + Math.sin(noodleTime)*2, 130, 12, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.arc(245 + Math.cos(noodleTime*1.3)*2, 125, 12, 0, Math.PI*2);
ctx.fill();

canvasTex.needsUpdate = true;
